description_long: This stereo sound system features a large central console with a prominent mesh speaker grille, which includes a circular design element at its center. Flanking the main unit are two tall, rectangular speaker towers, each with multiple visible speaker drivers protected by metallic grilles. The central console houses a keyboard, a set of colored control buttons, and what appears to be a control panel, all set into a sleek, dark surface. The lower portion of the main unit is clad in a blocky, metallic texture, suggesting reinforced construction. The overall design is modern and industrial, with a focus on functionality and durability. The system is likely intended for high-powered audio output in a public or urban environment.
description: A modern, industrial stereo sound system with a large central console, mesh speaker grille, and two tall speaker towers, featuring a keyboard and colored control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main console with a large mesh speaker grille, keyboard, colored control buttons, and two tall speaker towers with visible speaker drivers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the console and the rectangular profile of the speaker towers, with the keyboard and control panel partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain metallic back of the console and speaker towers, with no visible controls or speaker drivers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side profile of the system and a partial view of the colored control buttons.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles feature a fine metallic mesh with a central circular design on the main console grille and horizontal mesh patterns on the tower speakers.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the main console, featuring a set of four large, colored buttons arranged in a square, and a keyboard centrally placed below the speaker grille.
